lab.description: One to one replica of the default UNSA lab report template - for a single lab report

multi-lab.description: One to one replica of the default UNSA lab report template - to have all your lab reports under the same directory

simple-report.description: Clean simple academic report template with a customizable cover page - for a single report

multi-simple-report.description: Clean simple academic report template with a customizable cover page - to have multiple reports under the same directory
